session_focus.summary: This session (tail of the window): swapped toolforge-pdf's mock xberg.exe stub for real pdf-parse extraction, ingested a 1072-page Sorensen oral-history transcript for the CIC documentary treatment, cross-referenced it against 22 of 37 blocked verification items in charlie-deep-research, then ran an extensive manual Chronicling America newspaper search (user-driven, ~60+ hits triaged) that resolved V-8.1c outright and produced new leads for V-5.3, V-6.3, and V-4.5a.
